# Deployment Checklist — Sprint 9 Week 1

## Pre-Deployment Verification

- [x] 1. All unit tests passing
- [ ] 2. Integration tests passing
- [ ] 3. Security scan completed
- [ ] 4. Performance benchmarks meet SLA targets
- [ ] 5. Database migration scripts reviewed
- [ ] 6. Rollback plan documented

## Deployment Steps

- [ ] 7. Backup production database
- [ ] 8. Deploy to staging environment
- [ ] 9. Run smoke tests on staging
- [ ] 10. Deploy to production
- [ ] 11. Monitor error rates for 30 minutes
- [ ] 12. Send deployment notification to team

## Post-Deployment

- [ ] 13. Verify all critical paths functional
- [ ] 14. Update deployment log
- [ ] 15. Archive deployment artifacts
